title: Morocco’s King Mohammed VI leads emotional Laylat ul Qadr prayer at Royal Palace in Rabat
summary_full: Morocco celebrated the sacred Laylat ul Qadr with King Mohammed VI leading a spiritual vigil. The event honoured Quranic scholars and students, reinforcing the nation's commitment to Islamic learning. This observance blends deep religious devotion with unique cultural traditions, showcasing the monarchy's role in preserving faith and heritage. Dignitaries attended, underscoring Morocco's ties with Muslim nations.
